detail: kot-f1k-run us-central1-a n2d-highmem-8 SPOT (provisioningModel=SPOT, preemptible=true, instanceTerminationAction=STOP), 60GB pd-ssd boot + 2x375 local NVMe, ubuntu-2204-lts, scopes storage-rw. External IP 35.255.138.98 internal 10.128.0.7. verify_pins()+reuse --gate ran GREEN before create. Assigned all-in SPOT rate $0.17394/h (billing-catalog; unchanged vs runner-6/7 same machine+zone <24h; catalog updates <=monthly) IN-WINDOW [0.0811,0.5948]. GCS heartbeat PRE-RESET to reprovisioning-runner8 (non-FAILED) + stale runner-7 bringup artifacts cleared BEFORE arming (anti stale-heartbeat false-teardown); estate/ COMPLETE untouched. Billing started.

watchdog.sh (sha 8efa0f65, byte-verified) setsid+nohup pid 3757109; deadline 8h poll 300s. Deletes VM+SSD on heartbeat FAILED* OR status TERMINATED/STOPPING/STOPPED/SUSPENDED OR 8h deadline; HOLDS on DONE-READY-FOR-ONBOX-REVIEW. GCS heartbeat pre-reset non-FAILED so first poll does NOT teardown. ANTI-ORPHAN LAYER 1 ARMED before deploy.

On-VM shas verified: bundle 1557cd8b (carries edited f1k_worker.sh + bringup_gcp.sh with the nf5n inertness-gate ops change), vm_setup aa6504d6 (byte-identical to runner-7). VM = AMD EPYC 7B13, 8 vCPU, 62GB RAM (61 free), 58GB root. vm_setup.sh launched detached: arms guest max-life backstop (15h), installs gsutil/mdadm/build, RAID0 2x375 NVMe -> /mnt/nvme, unpacks bundle, copies kae-patch-draft, pre-clones pristine colibri@a78a06fc (COLIBRI_TREE + blob 1d74f788 verify), writes run-worker.sh (env KOT_F1K_BUCKET/COLIBRI_GIT_URL/KOT_F1K_SPOT_RATE=0.17394 + on-exit backstop), launches the committed worker. Worker step 1 detects the GCS COMPLETE marker -> restores estate from mirror (~12min), NOT a fresh 384GB HF download. 3 anti-orphan backstops: control-box watchdog (8h) + guest max-life (15h) + run-worker on-exit shutdown.
